releaseNotes: • Improvement: Comprehensive diagnostic logging added across all playback subsystems (multi-view cells, ExoPlayer, MpvEngine, OverlayPlayer, EnginePicker, M3U/Xtream sources, settings service). Every state transition — engine open/close, buffering, errors, focus changes, PIP mode — now appears in the debug log for instant remote diagnosis. No behaviour changes; logging is gated by the debug-logging setting.
